scope: Pass B review of the Insightful Developer Portal/Postman collection. The connector keeps the legacy read-only record contracts for employee, team, project, and directory resources; remaining documented endpoints are detail duplicates, sensitive monitoring/reporting windows, or workforce-management mutations.

excluded.reason: Detail endpoints return the same resource shapes as the covered list streams and would require caller-supplied IDs rather than producing an independent syncable collection.
Despite using GET in the documented collection, this endpoint deactivates an employee account and is a mutation, not a read stream.
Time-window reads are parameterized monitoring windows rather than durable resource lists; adding them needs an explicit date/window contract and privacy review.
Screenshot endpoints expose employee desktop captures or screenshot metadata tied to image payloads; the connector does not sync binary/surveillance captures.
Activity analytics require explicit employee/time filters and emit high-volume monitoring events, not the legacy resource record surface.
Task endpoints are project-management workflow records outside legacy's employee/team/project/directory contract and require a separate task schema and permission review.
Create endpoints invite employees or create workforce-management records and require administrative privileges; legacy Write is unsupported.
Update endpoints mutate monitored employees, teams, projects, or tasks and require a dedicated reverse-ETL approval/risk design.
Delete endpoints remove live Insightful project/task management data and are intentionally not exposed by this read-only connector.
